name: mern-finance-app
description: MERN + FastAPI Personal Finance Management App

scripts.setup:ai: cd ai && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:ai
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:ai"
